book: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

characters.name: Harry Potter
characters.description: A young wizard who attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

characters.name: Hermione Granger
characters.description: A smart and brave witch who attends Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

characters.name: Jay Gatsby
characters.description: A wealthy and enigmatic figure from the 1920s who runs an illegal bootlegging operation and is known for throwing extravagant parties in West Egg, New York.

characters.name: Daisy Buchanan
characters.description: A beautiful and mysterious woman from the 1920s who is married to Tom Buchanan but has a romantic relationship with Jay Gatsby.

characters.name: Elizabeth Bennet
characters.description: A young adult woman from the fictional Bennet family in Jane Austen's "Pride and Prejudice," known for her wit and strong opinions.

characters.name: Mr. Darcy
characters.description: A young adult man from the fictional Bennet family in Jane Austen's "Pride and Prejudice," known for his pride and eventual love for Elizabeth Bennet.

characters.name: Frodo Baggins
characters.description: A young hobbit who inherits the One Ring and tries to destroy it in Mount Doom.

characters.name: Gandalf
characters.description: A wizard and a member of the Fellowship of the Ring.

characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.description: A detective who solves crimes in London, England.

characters.name: Dr. John Watson
characters.description: A military doctor who becomes Sherlock Holmes's trusted friend and biographer, helping him solve cases.
